'''Jarrat''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer serving with [[Sixth Negative Regions|Black Sword Command]]. He was captured by the [[Yevetha]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]].

==Biography==
After more than a decade of captivity, however, Jarrat had become one of the leaders of [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Sil Sorannan]]'s plot to liberate the remaining Imperial personnel in the [[Koornacht Cluster/Legends|Koornacht Cluster]] and return the [[Duskhan League]]'s fleet of captured [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]] to Imperial control. As such, Jarrat was responsible for initiating the [[slave circuit]]ry that had been installed aboard the [[Valorous (Victory-class)|''Valorous'']], and seizing control of the squadron for which it had served as a command ship.

{{Char-stub}}
